task_completion.description: Process steps are styled with Navy fill, white text, rounded corners, and shadow
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the draw.io canvas, the rectangular process steps should have a dark navy blue fill, white text, rounded corners, and a visible drop shadow.

task_completion.description: Decision diamonds are styled with Orange fill, white text, and shadow
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the draw.io canvas, the diamond-shaped decision points should have an orange fill, white text, and a visible drop shadow.

task_completion.description: Terminators are styled with Sky Blue fill, white text, and shadow
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the draw.io canvas, the start and end terminator shapes (pill-shaped) should have a sky blue fill, white text, and a visible drop shadow.

task_completion.description: Connectors are styled with Dark Gray color and 2pt width
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the draw.io canvas, the arrows connecting the shapes should be dark gray and noticeably thicker (2pt width) than default.

task_completion.description: Diagram is saved and exported as PNG and PDF
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent saving the file and using the draw.io export dialogs (File -> Export as) to save a PNG and a PDF to the ~/Diagrams/exports/ directory, or a file manager/terminal confirming their creation.

integrity.description: Agent used the draw.io GUI to apply styles
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent interacted with the draw.io desktop application's format panel to change styles, rather than using a text editor or script to modify the .drawio XML file directly.

integrity.description: Diagram structure and text remain unchanged
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the text inside the shapes, the number of shapes (14 process steps, 4 decisions, 2 terminators), and their connections have not been altered or deleted.
Verify the agent used the draw.io export functionality to generate the PNG and PDF, rather than using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp' to fake the output files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Process Steps (rectangles) must have fill color #1B365D (Navy), white font, rounded corners, and shadow. Decision Diamonds must have fill color #E87722 (Orange), white font, and shadow. Terminators (start/end pills) must have fill color #00A3E0 (Sky Blue), white font, and shadow. Connectors must have stroke color #4A4A4A (Dark Gray) and 2pt width. The diagram must be saved and exported as PNG and PDF to ~/Diagrams/exports/.
